function: "between"(arg_1 any, arg_2 any, arg_3 any, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean)
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value1 VARCHAR(50), value2 JSON, value3 DATE, value4 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value1, value2, value3, value4) VALUES (1, 'abc', json '{"key":100}', '2021-01-01', 1.01);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value1, value2, value3, value4) VALUES (2, 'ab', json '{"key":150}', '2021-01-02', 1.02);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value1, value2, value3, value4) VALUES (3, 'ac', json '{"key":80}', '2021-01-03', 1.03);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value1, value2, value3, value4) VALUES (4, NULL, json '{"key":200}', '2021-01-04', NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value1, value2, value3, value4) VALUES (5, 'a', json 'null', '2021-01-05', 1.05);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, range_start VARCHAR(50), range_end VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO another_table (ref_id, range_start, range_end) VALUES (1, 'aa', 'az');
INSERT INTO another_table (ref_id, range_start, range_end) VALUES (2, 'ab', 'ac');

SELECT t1.id, t1.value1, t1.value2 FROM test_table t1 JOIN another_table t2 ON BETWEEN(t1.value1, t2.range_start, t2.range_end, false, false, false, false, false) WHERE t1.value4 IS NOT NULL AND t1.value4 > 1.00;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE BETWEEN(json_extract(t2.value2, '$.key')::INT, 50, 150, false, false, false, false, false) AND t2.value3 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t3.id, t3.value1, (CASE WHEN t3.value4 IS NULL THEN 'Null Value' ELSE 'Non-Null' END) AS value_desc FROM test_table t3 WHERE t3.value1 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t3.value1;
SELECT t4.id, t4.value1, t4.value2 FROM test_table t4 WHERE json_valid(t4.value2::TEXT) AND t4.value3 BETWEEN '2021-01-01' AND CURRENT_DATE;
SELECT AVG(t5.value4) AS avg_value FROM test_table t5 GROUP BY CASE WHEN BETWEEN(t5.value1, 'a', 'z', false, false, false, false, false) THEN t5.id ELSE NULL END HAVING AVG(t5.value4) > 1.02;
SELECT DISTINCT t6.value1 FROM test_table t6 WHERE COALESCE(t6.value1, '') != '' AND BETWEEN(NULL, 'b', 'c', false, false, false, false, false);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value4 < 1.02;
